planets.name: Way

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2023-08-13
artifacts.excerpt:
In retrospect I was quite mean to all my female exes. I usually made them say things out loud in a legible way before I would act on their preferences, even though I often knew what they wanted. A sort of indirect "use your words".

What kind of tyranny is this?

artifacts.title: Way receipt from 2022-10-31
artifacts.excerpt:
The root of Christianity (at least from Augustine onward) is self-hate. 

In the same way that racketeers promise 'protection', Christians promise 'forgiveness'- as if there was anything to forgive for being alive.
